title: Child Moving Inward on a Merry-Go-Round
body: Three children are riding on the edge of a merry-go-round that is $$100$$ kg, has a $$1.60-m$$ radius, and is spinning at $$20.0$$ rpm. The merry-go-round is a uniform disk (I=(1/2)*M*R**2). The children have masses of $$22.0$$, $$28.0$$, and $$33.0$$ kg. The child who has a mass of $$28.0$$ kg moves to the center of the merry-go-round.
